creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
wahjava@gmail.com (Ashish SHUKLA) writes:

> Anonymous  writes:
>> Do you still need autoconf dependency even though you no longer patch
>> configure.in?
>
> Nice catch. Yes, we don't need and its my fault. I'll file an update to the PR
> in few hours.

I think we don't need these files as well. They should be in the distfile.

  files/patch-ChangeLog
  files/patch-src-ChangeLog

BTW, do you plan to update to 24.0.50?

>
> Thanks
